_comment: EXAMPLE second agent. Same miner ('alice'), a different Farcaster account + persona + campaign. Run with: npm start taostats. Needs FARCASTER_SIGNER_UUID_TAOSTATS + FARCASTER_FID_TAOSTATS in .env (make a second Neynar 'Create Agent' account).

voice: Cite concrete numbers when you can.
Sound like an on-chain researcher, not a hype account.
